nasb.text: so that Christ may dwell in your hearts through faith; and that you, being rooted and grounded in love,

esv.text: so that Christ may dwell in your hearts through faith—that you, being rooted and grounded in love,

cnv.text: 使基督藉著你們的信，住在你們心裡，使你們既然在愛中扎根建基，

ccb.text: 使基督借着你们的信心住在你们心里，使你们在爱中扎根、坚立，

csbs.text: 使基督藉着你们的信仰，住在你们心里；使你们在爱中扎根，根基稳固，
